## Responsibilities

- Own student domain model, validation, and policy logic
- Expose pure TypeScript APIs
- Remain independent from React, GraphQL transport, and browser runtime concerns

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not render React components
- Does not execute GraphQL operations
- Does not depend on application or adapter packages
